title: potentilla supina f. elatior
intro: Potentilla supina f. elatior is a variety of the Potentilla supina plant, a flowering perennial native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Potentilla supina f. elatior include reducing inflammation and pain, supporting immune function, and potentially aiding in the treatment of various infections and conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and may also be used in salves and topical applications to leverage its medicinal properties.
